avoid: never name a real person (roles only)
never put words in a family member's mouth
visual: no family members/children in frame
delivery-only: no dine-in/restaurant/cart scenes — the food arrives
no gym/workout framing (this is a food brand)
red-line: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12)
red-line: We are a very culturally sensitive brand and we don’t want any issues or taking side things emotion and new culture commenty and normal Saudi people the aavrage
positioning: Authentic taste and quality in every delivery.
angles_to_pursue: Highlight the quality and taste of each dish, focusing on the ingredients and preparation process.
Showcase customer testimonials and reviews, emphasizing positive feedback on taste and quality.
Create content around the convenience and reliability of delivery, addressing and reassuring about past delivery delays.
Develop stories around the cultural and traditional significance of each dish, without featuring people.
Focus on the packaging and presentation of the food, ensuring it looks appealing and ready-to-eat.
research_requests: Explore how to improve delivery times and communication with customers.
Investigate customer preferences for visual content that aligns with cultural sensitivities.
Research competitive positioning and customer expectations in the Saudi food delivery market.
